desingularization.radial_cut_lift: unreplaced closing edges remain on the radial cut; a replaced closing-edge pair lifts to the two terminal-side replacement edges
desingularization.rule: each two-edge parallel endpoint bundle is replaced by a simple cubic K4-minus-terminal-edge two-pole; terminal colors cross through the pole and the internal edge receives the third color

source: Section 9.2 K4-two-pole desingularization audit for the closed-collar winding-freedom witness
